ddls:
CREATE TABLE "passengers" (
  "passenger_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each passenger */,
  "survived" INTEGER /* Indicates if the passenger survived (1) or not (0) */,
  "class_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the class of the passenger */,
  "sex" TEXT /* Gender of the passenger */,
  "age" REAL /* Age of the passenger */,
  "fare" REAL /* Fare paid by the passenger */,
  "embark_town_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the embarkation town of the passenger */,
  "alone" INTEGER /* Indicates if the passenger traveled alone (1) or not (0) */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the passenger */,
  "cabin" TEXT /* Cabin number of the passenger */,
  "ticket_number" TEXT /* Ticket number of the passenger */,
  "lifeboat_id" INTEGER /* ID of the lifeboat used by the passenger (if survived) */,
  "family_size" INTEGER /* Total number of family members traveling with the passenger */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the passenger */,
  "occupation" TEXT /* Occupation of the passenger */,
  "travel_reason" TEXT /* Reason for travel (e.g., business, pleasure) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("passenger_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_passengers_class_id FOREIGN KEY ("class_id") REFERENCES classes ("class_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_passengers_embark_town_id FOREIGN KEY ("embark_town_id") REFERENCES embark_towns ("embark_town_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "classes" (
  "class_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each class */,
  "class_name" TEXT /* Name of the class (e.g., First, Second, Third) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the class */,
  "price_range" TEXT /* Price range for the class */,
  "deck" TEXT /* Deck(s) where the class is located */,
  "amenities" TEXT /* Description of amenities available in the class */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "embark_towns" (
  "embark_town_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each embarkation town */,
  "town_name" TEXT /* Name of the embarkation town */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the embarkation town is located */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the embarkation town */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the embarkation town */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("embark_town_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "survival_statistics" (
  "statistic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the statistics record */,
  "class_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the class of passengers */,
  "total_passengers" INTEGER /* Total number of passengers in the class */,
  "survivors" INTEGER /* Number of survivors from the class */,
  "survival_rate" REAL /* Calculated survival rate for the class */,
  "male_count" INTEGER /* Number of male passengers in the class */,
  "female_count" INTEGER /* Number of female passengers in the class */,
  "average_age" REAL /* Average age of passengers in the class */,
  "average_fare" REAL /* Average fare paid by passengers in the class */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("statistic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_survival_statistics_class_id FOREIGN KEY ("class_id") REFERENCES classes ("class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "passenger_analysis" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis record */,
  "passenger_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the passenger being analyzed */,
  "attribute_name" TEXT /* Name of the attribute being analyzed (e.g., 'fare', 'age') */,
  "attribute_value" TEXT /* Value of the attribute being analyzed */,
  "analysis_date" TEXT /* Date when the analysis was conducted */,
  "analysis_tool" TEXT /* Tool or method used for the analysis */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_passenger_analysis_passenger_id FOREIGN KEY ("passenger_id") REFERENCES passengers ("passenger_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_accounts" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, admin) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user accessing the data */,
  "data_accessed" TEXT /* Details of the data accessed */,
  "access_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the data was accessed */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the data was accessed */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES user_accounts ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the report */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the report */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of report creation */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the report */,
  "last_updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the report */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number of the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_author_id FOREIGN KEY ("author_id") REFERENCES user_accounts ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "predictive_models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each predictive model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the predictive model */,
  "model_type" TEXT /* Type of the model (e.g., logistic regression) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the model was created */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the predictive model */,
  "parameters" TEXT /* Parameters used in the model */,
  "training_data_set" TEXT /* Name of the data set used for training the model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for performance metrics */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the predictive model */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Model accuracy percentage */,
  "precision" REAL /* Model precision percentage */,
  "recall" REAL /* Model recall percentage */,
  "f1_score" REAL /* F1 score of the model */,
  "auc_roc" REAL /* Area Under the ROC Curve of the model */,
  "cross_validation_score" REAL /* Cross-validation score of the model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_performance_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES predictive_models ("model_id")
)
